title: Trade Relief Measures for Exporters
description: Due to ongoing geopolitical uncertainties and logistical disruptions, Reserve Bank of India has been receiving representations from various stakeholders regarding challenges in adhering to the timelines for realisation of export proceeds. In this regard, Reserve Bank, vide Press Release No. 2025-2026/1510 dated November 14, 2025, had advised extension in the time period for realisation and repatriation of full export value of goods/software/services exported from India from nine months to fiftee
